headline: Kimco Realty Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Kimco Realty (NYSE:KIM) reported first-quarter 2026 funds from operations (FFO) of $0.46 per diluted share, a 4.5% increase from the prior year, as management pointed to higher minimum rents, strong tenant retention, and favorable credit loss trends. Same-property net operating income (NOI) rose 1.7
